numerical_constraints.name: Gracht profiel H-H' totale breedte

reasons: Dimension label clearly shown in cross-section drawing totalling 28.50 m
Individual sub-dimensions sum to 28.50 m confirming the total

numerical_constraints.notes: Total cross-section width of the canal profile H-H' (fietsverbinding twee richtingen). Sub-dimensions shown: 2.50 + 4.00 + 5.00 + 9.00 + 5.00 + 2.25 + 0.75 = 28.50 m

narrative_constraints.statement: Canal cross-section profile H-H' accommodates a bicycle connection in two directions (fietsverbinding twee richtingen), with a total width of 28.50 m including water, green zones, and cycling lanes.

reasons: Clearly stated in the section title and subtitle
Cross-section drawing confirms bicycle path and canal elements

urban_intent_passages: Gracht - profiel H-H' (fietsverbinding twee richtingen): Canal profile with a total cross-section of 28.50 m accommodating cycling connections in two directions, with green planting, water, and pedestrian/cycle zones.
